exactOptionalPropertyTypesArgumentError.tlua(2,3): error TS2379: Argument of type '{ y: nil; }' is not assignable to parameter of type '{ y?: string; }' with 'exactOptionalPropertyTypes: true'. Consider adding 'undefined' to the types of the target's properties.
  Types of property 'y' are incompatible.
    Type 'nil' is not assignable to type 'string'.


==== exactOptionalPropertyTypesArgumentError.tlua (1 errors) ====
    declare function f(o: { y?: string }): void;
    f({ y = undefined });
      ~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~
!!! error TS2379: Argument of type '{ y: nil; }' is not assignable to parameter of type '{ y?: string; }' with 'exactOptionalPropertyTypes: true'. Consider adding 'undefined' to the types of the target's properties.
!!! error TS2379:   Types of property 'y' are incompatible.
!!! error TS2379:     Type 'nil' is not assignable to type 'string'.
